backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend with data types and CRUD operations for memories, quotes, fun facts, and messages, plus a passphrase verification function using the hardcoded code 'Nobita'.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for component purposes and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Doraemon Secret World' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app router using TanStack Router, defining all routes with authentication guards, a RootLayout that enables the double-knock sound globally, and wiring all page components including six game sub-routes.
frontend/src/components/FloatingMusicCon: Fixed bottom-right floating UI component providing play/pause toggle and an expandable volume slider for background music, powered by the useBGM hook.
frontend/src/components/GlassPanel.tsx: Reusable glassmorphism card component supporting configurable neon glow border colors, optional float animation, hover lift effect, and a style prop.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main application shell with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation bar, and logout functionality, rendering child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Fixed decorative background component that renders 80 randomly positioned twinkling stars and 8 floating bubbles using memoized arrays and CSS custom properties for animation timing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBGM.ts: Custom hook that manages background music playback via an HTML Audio element, exposing play/pause/toggle controls and volume adjustment.
frontend/src/hooks/useClickSound.ts: Custom hook that synthesizes a Doraemon-style two-note bell chime using the Web Audio API and plays it on every global click or touch event, throttled to 120ms.
frontend/src/hooks/useDoubleKnockSound.t: Custom hook that plays a 'Double Knock' audio file on every global click or touch event, throttled to 120ms to prevent overlapping playback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend operations including memories, quotes, fun facts, messages, and auth code verification, each wired to the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines the Doraemon-themed color palette using OKLCH tokens, Tailwind base/utilities, glassmorphism classes, and neon glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider contexts.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat interface page where users can send messages and receive bot responses as Nobita, with typing indicators, quick replies, and a hello sound on mount.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a grid of navigation portals to different app sections, with background BGM and seed data initialization on mount.
frontend/src/pages/FriendshipPage.tsx: Page showcasing Nobita and Doraemon friendship quotes in animated glass panels that slide in on scroll.
frontend/src/pages/games/ExamQuizPage.ts: A 10-question Doraemon trivia quiz game where the player answers multiple-choice questions and tries to beat Nobita's exam score of zero.
frontend/src/pages/games/GadgetClickerPa: A 30-second timed clicker mini-game where the player clicks randomly spawned gadget emojis before they disappear, tracking score and missed clicks.
frontend/src/pages/games/MazePage.tsx: A maze game page that generates a random maze using recursive backtracking and lets the player navigate with keyboard arrow/WASD keys, tracking moves and elapsed time until reaching the goal.
frontend/src/pages/games/MemoryMatchPage: A memory card matching game page with 12 emoji pairs that handles card flipping, match detection, move counting, and a win condition when all pairs are matched.
frontend/src/pages/games/SlidingPuzzlePa: A 3x3 sliding puzzle game page where tiles are shuffled and the player clicks adjacent tiles to slide them into the correct order, tracking moves and elapsed time.
frontend/src/pages/games/WhackADoraemonP: A whack-a-mole style game page with a 9-hole grid, 30-second timer, combo scoring, and random character spawning at set intervals.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Games hub page listing six Doraemon-themed mini-games as clickable cards that navigate to individual game routes.
frontend/src/pages/LockScreen.tsx: Authentication gate page with a code input form that verifies a passcode and redirects to the dashboard on success, playing a sound effect.
frontend/src/pages/MemoriesPage.tsx: A page for displaying and adding personal memories, featuring a card grid with animated GlassPanel components and a form to submit new memory entries via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/pages/OurMemoriesPage.tsx: A photo gallery page showing a curated set of memory photos with a lightbox viewer, back navigation, and an audio track that auto-plays on page entry.
frontend/src/pages/QuotesPage.tsx: A page that fetches and displays a random inspirational quote and a random Doraemon fun fact, with manual and auto-refresh functionality using React Query.
frontend/src/utils/botResponses.ts: A rule-based NLP chatbot engine that provides in-character responses as Nobita Nobi from Doraemon, with categorized response pools for topics like greetings, love, friendship, and memories.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Defines and exports sample data arrays (memories, quotes, fun facts) with Doraemon-themed content used to populate the app's UI with placeholder/seed content.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, a Doraemon color palette, glow/glass box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's versioned state including a summary, architectural notes, implemented features (BGM, click sounds, random quotes, memory gallery edits), and pending new feature requests.
